textByHash.f43c1788b4c28806cd6853ce1956df218b06a403: Meh, I don't want to talk about it.
textByHash.cbc12d23040d8be8232f59533cf846ddeb643b92: Not too well. I miss my friend. She couldn't join us here today.
textByHash.be7d85a55545179983dc5f3ff3122678e4bc859c: She had some afterlife business to take care of. Nieve's always so busy.
textByHash.7f737cfedffd0c50e67c15381da28026bc57bfa5: Really? You must be ! She talks about you a lot.
